plan_summary.plan_name: White House East Wing Container Casino (Pioneer's Gauntlet)
plan_summary.primary_goal: Launch Phase 1 container casino on the demolished White House East Wing site to clear 90 continuous days of profitable operation at $50K daily NOI, unlock the 75% sponsor capital tranche, and segregate $90M into an externally auditable political-reversal contingency.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests five gates: continuous-profitable-days margin against the 90-day sponsor-unlock threshold; daily-NOI margin against the $50K/day Phase-1 floor; budget surplus against the $600M sponsor ceiling; political-contingency-fund margin against the $90M ring-fenced target; and relocation-blackout-duration margin against the 7-day operational pause. GSA/DOI post-facto authorization, AML/KYC International Banking Consortium acceptance, sovereign-leader diplomatic participation, and court-injunction avoidance are unmodelled existential gates.

key_values.label: Continuous-profitability sponsor-unlock target
key_values.comment: 90 continuous profitable operating days unlock the 75% sponsor capital tranche; below this the entire Pioneer's Gauntlet thesis loses its funding mechanism.
key_values.source_text: If temporary container casino operation is not continuous for ninety (90) days, then sponsor capital release is not triggered.

key_values.label: Phase-1 daily NOI target
key_values.comment: Phase 1 must clear $50,000 NOI/day for 90 days to satisfy the sponsor profitability gate; Premortem stress test names operational outages costing $5–10K/day.
key_values.source_text: Target NOI per day for funding unlock: $50,000 USD — Phase 1 performance gate.

key_values.label: Sponsor capital ceiling
key_values.comment: $600M total sponsor commitment ceiling; the entire Pioneer's Gauntlet financial envelope before citizen funding or supplemental tranches.
key_values.source_text: Initial sponsorship budget amount: $600 million USD — total CapEx budget.

key_values.label: Political-reversal contingency-fund segregation target
key_values.comment: 15% of $600M ring-fenced into an externally auditable escrow for political-reversal site remediation; below this the reversal-recovery runway shrinks.
key_values.source_text: Contingency fund ring-fenced amount: 15% of $600M — capital reserve guardrail.

key_values.label: Phase-1 relocation operational-blackout target
key_values.comment: The Phase-1→Phase-2 relocation must complete within a 7-day blackout; Issue 2 names overrun as the trigger that breaks the 90-day continuous-profit gate.
key_values.source_text: The temporary container structure can be effectively relocated in a 7-day operational blackout.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved continuous profitable operating days at the sponsor-unlock measurement
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives whether the 90-day sponsor-unlock clears; Issue 2 names the 7-day blackout breaking continuity, Risk 3 names supply-chain delays compounding profitable-day count.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Project Phase-1 ramp curve × daily-NOI variance distribution × blackout-overrun probability; sensitivity to Risk 3 supply-chain delays, Issue 2 T2CA vetting ramp.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved Phase-1 daily NOI averaged over the measurement window
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Above $50K the sponsor-trigger arithmetic clears; Premortem stress test names $5–10K/day operational-outage losses degrading the average.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Combine 60%-high-roller-mix × per-patron yield × T2CA throughput × occupancy rate, minus opex + security incidents (Risk 5); sensitivity to AML-banking-consortium spend ceiling.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved bottom-up program spend through Phase 1 close
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests whether the $600M envelope holds; review-plan names $10M+ legal costs from regulatory challenge, $2M supply-chain shock cost, $2M T2CA hardening (Issue 2).
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Sum Phase-1 container CAPEX + 2.5MW microgrid + $5M diplomatic-design + legal counsel + T2CA hardening + Risk-3 supply premium + Issue-2 T2CA budget; sensitivity to Risk 1 regulatory legal cost.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved political-reversal contingency-fund segregation
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Below $90M the political-reversal escrow is under-funded, and Decision-10 site-remediation runway shrinks; the contingency directly competes with the $5M diplomatic-design budget per Question 6.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: $90M target × actual escrow-execution-rate; sensitivity to sponsor-tranche-release variance and competing Q6 microgrid/diplomatic-design drawdown pressure.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved Phase-1 relocation operational-blackout duration
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Above 7 days the post-relocation 60-day profit window cannot start cleanly within the sponsor's 90-day clock, breaking the continuous-profit gate per Issue 2.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Container-move logistics simulation × T2CA security perimeter handover × microgrid re-energization; sensitivity to Risk 3 supply-chain components delaying the move-back.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Continuous-profitable-days margin against the 90-day sponsor-unlock threshold
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin unlocks the 75% sponsor capital tranche ($450M); negative margin strands Phase-2 mobilization and forces the project to draw down the $90M contingency for opex bridging.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Phase-1 daily-NOI margin against the $50K profitability floor
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin satisfies the profitability arithmetic of the sponsor unlock; negative margin breaks the unlock even on days the venue operates without incident.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Sponsor-budget surplus against the $600M envelope
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive surplus preserves the contingency for political-reversal remediation; negative surplus forces sponsor capital call mid-Phase-1 and erodes the unlock-trigger arithmetic.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Political-reversal contingency-fund margin against the $90M ring-fenced target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps the political-reversal remediation runway intact; negative margin leaves the project unable to execute Decision-10 site-restoration within the 90-day reversal mandate.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Relocation-blackout duration margin against the 7-day target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps the post-relocation 60-day profit window inside the sponsor's 90-day clock; negative margin breaks the continuous-profit gate per Issue 2's stress test.

unmodelled_gates.label: GSA and DOI issue conditional Notice-to-Proceed for post-facto White House East Wing land-use authorization
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Issue 1 names this as a near-100%-probability existential failure mode: without legal pathway the entire $600M deployment is stranded regardless of operational performance; expert review judges the standard authorization timeline incompatible with the 15-day diplomatic engagement window.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Project halts immediately; $90M contingency drawn down; 100% of $510M undeployed construction budget lost; ROI reduced 80–100% per Issue 1 sensitivity.

unmodelled_gates.label: International Banking Consortium accepts Decision-14 Option-1 (fungible bank-settled high-value transactions only)
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Data Item 4 names AML/KYC compliance as the existential prerequisite for high-roller revenue capture; loss of banking access shocks liquidity from the consortium and halts settlement of patron markers regardless of physical operations.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: High-value patron settlements halt; daily NOI collapses well below $50K target; sponsor unlock missed; ancillary services cannot bridge the gap.

unmodelled_gates.label: Sovereign-leader delegations participate in the venue at expected levels (40% diplomatic-allocation prerequisite)
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Review-plan names sovereign-leader participation as the load-bearing assumption for the 60/40 high-roller-diplomatic mix that the daily-NOI arithmetic depends on; boycotts driven by geopolitical instability are an unmodelled stress test.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Diplomatic-allocation 40% sits empty; high-roller 60% cannot absorb full 999-guest capacity; daily NOI shifts below $50K floor.

unmodelled_gates.label: No adverse court ruling halts construction during Phase 1 build or Phase 2 foundation
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Premortem FM1 / Expert Criticism: a single adverse court ruling halts the project mid-construction with 6–12 month delay and $10M+ legal cost, stranding all temporary-facility investment regardless of revenue performance.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: 6–12 month construction halt; $10M+ legal costs; container facility stranded; all sponsor capital frozen pending legal resolution.
